Nevertheless, be mindful of your emotional responses, as the Moon's transit through Mesha can sometimes lead to mood swings and conflict in personal connections.

The transit of Jupiter through Karka can support your overall health, but it's essential to maintain a balanced lifestyle to fully benefit from this positive influence.
